reasoning: Lactate clearance is our primary focus, addressing the steep drop from 5-min to 20-min power. Your last ride was a steady effort with low variability, so today we'll push your body to adapt to the changing demands of the Alpine Loop. This will develop your aerobic base and fatigue resistance, crucial for maintaining target power on that key climb.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3 x 12-min over-unders: 4-min at 242W, 4-min at 218W, 4-min at 256W, 3-min recovery between sets at 201W

weekly_focus: This week: close the 5-to-20 gap with over-unders and Zone 2 base work.
